title: polygonum recumbens var. roylei
intro: Polygonum recumbens var. roylei, also known as Himalayan knotweed or Himalayan polygonum, is a plant species belonging to the Polygonaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygonum recumbens var. roylei include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
